name: Tomato Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate beef slices for 30 minutes.
2. Heat wok with 2 tablespoons oil and garlic for 30 seconds, add beef, cook for 1 to 2 minutes, remove and drain the oil.
3. Set aside.
4. Heat wok, then add tomato wedges and stir for 2 minutes.
5. Add sauce mixture. Thicken if too watery.
6. Return beef and stir well, serve hot. Serve immediately.
